hero.title: Laboratoire ya Innovation
hero.description: Tala ba démonstrations, ba expériences, mpe bilakiseli ya tekiniki ya ekipi na biso ya ba ingénieurs.

hero.title: Laboratoire ya Innovation
hero.description: Tolukaka bandelo oyo ebongi na AI, automatisation, mpe ba systeme oyo ekabolami, na nsima tobongolaka bolukiluki oyo endimami na makoki ya kobimisa oyo ebongi kotyelama motema.

researchAreas.title: Bisika ya bolukiluki
researchAreas.description: Esika moko na moko esangisaka bolukiluki ya bolukiluki na banzela ya kosalela oyo ebongisami mpo na basysteme ya solo.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Focus Briefs ya détail
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Misala ya bolukiluki ya mikolo oyo ezali kobanda na validation ya architecture kino na ba plans ya kopesa yango.

fromLabToProduction.title: Kobanda na laboratoire tii na production
fromLabToProduction.description: Innovation na Horizon emekamaka na ba resultats ya masuwa, kasi na ba prototypes ya moke te.

roadmap.title: Feuille de route ya R&D
roadmap.description: Bokoli ya mokemoke kolongwa na kotonga makoki mpo na kokoma na ba systeme oyo ebongisaka ntango nyonso.

publications.title: Mikanda mpe makanisi
publications.description: Makomi ya tekiniki mpe banote ya mise en œuvre ya innovation oyo ezali kosalema.

appliedAi.title: Ba systeme ya AI appliqué
appliedAi.description: Ba architectures ya AI oyo ebongisami mpo na kosala modele, orchestration ya bilembo, mpe kotambwisa baekzamɛ.

automationFrameworks.title: Cadres ya automatisation
automationFrameworks.description: Bisaleli ya automatisation interne mpo na libateli ya déploiement, eyano na likama, mpe misala ya ingénierie oyo ekoki kozongelama mbala na mbala.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Bolukiluki na ba architectures résiliante, ekabolami oyo ebongisami mpo na performance, tolérance ya mbeba, mpe échelle.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Intelligence at the edge for low-latency decisioning, telemetry processing, and device fleet coordination.

nlp.title: Traitement ya lokota naturel
nlp.description: Ba pipeline ya bososoli ya minoko ebele mpo na classification, extraction, traduction, mpe ba systeme ya masolo.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Algorithme ya évolution mpe optimisation
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Ba systeme ya boluki mpe optimisation oyo epesami na boponi ya naturel mpo na kosilisa mikakatano ya ba ingénieur ya minene.

automationFrameworks.title: Cadres ya automatisation
automationFrameworks.description: Tozali kotonga ba cadres ya mosala oyo ekoki kosalema mpo na orchestration ya bobimi, bikuke ya qualité, mpe vérification ya post-déploiement mpo na kokitisa friction manuelle mpe komatisa bosembo.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Bolukiluki na biso ya architecture etalaka mingi mayele ya kopola ya basali, ndenge ya résilience na kati ya bituka, mpe ba enveloppe ya performance mpo na ba systeme oyo ezali kosala na bosenga makasi.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Tozali valider lolenge ya streaming ya makambo mpe ya inférence ya pembeni oyo esalisaka na kozwa bikateli ya mboka na lombango ntango tozali kobatela contrôle ya central, auditability, mpe modele ya gouvernance ya cycle de vie.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Adaptive Capacity Planning
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Ba prototype ya laboratoire endimami na misala ya simulé mpe na nsima esangani na mayele ya autoscaling ya plateforme.

operationalIntelligence.title: Renseignement opérationnel
operationalIntelligence.description: Ba pipeline ya NLP elongwaki na baekzame oyo endimami mpo na kosunga production mpo na triage ya lombango mpe bososoli ya polele.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Optimisation na ba systeme ya livraison
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Ba methode ya évolution oyo emekami na laboratoire ebongolamaka na ba moteurs ya optimisation mpo na kosala manaka mpe kokabola yango.

edgeDecisioning.title: Ekateli ya Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT mpe baekzamɛ ya inférence ya pembeni ekómi makasi na misala ya latence ya moke na bandelo ya makasi ya bosembo.

now.title: Fondations d'AI appliquée
now.description: Kofungola ba modèles oyo ekoki kosalelama lisusu, suites ya évaluation, mpe mibeko ya kotala na baekipi ya produit.

next.title: Misala ya Ingénierie Autonome
next.description: Kosalela ba cadres ya automatisation oyo ekitisaka likama ya déploiement mpe kokitisa banzela ya kozongisa biloko na masuwa.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Mayele ya Edge-Native
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Échelle ya ba architectures hybrides ya cloud-edge mpo na inférence pene ya temps réel na ba environnements sensibles na latence.

longHorizon.title: Ba systeme ya optimisation ya continu
longHorizon.description: Kosangisa baekzamɛ, kolandela, mpe optimisation mpo ba systeme emesana na likama soki makambo ebongwani.

aiReliability.title: Ba systèmes ya AI oyo etikalaka fiable na production
aiReliability.summary: Likanisi ya malamu na oyo etali bokatikati ya vitɛsi ya komeka na gouvernance ya production.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Modele ya architecture distribuée mpo na ba plateformes ya makasi
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Banote ya terrain ya komeka architecture etalaki performance, résilience, mpe simplicité ya misala.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Applied R&D for Business Outcomes
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Ndenge tobongisaka misala ya innovation mpo ete bokundoli elongwa na prototype mpo na kokende na valɛrɛ oyo ekoki komekama.

cta.title: Kotonga na Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Kosala elongo na biso mpo na kondima makanisi ya makasi na lombango mpe komema makanisi ya malamu na ba systeme ya production ya malamu mpe ya makasi.

hero.title: Ba systeme ya AI appliqué
hero.description: Na mokuse ya lolenge Horizon ezali kokela, kosalela, mpe kosalela ba systeme ya koyekola na machine kobanda na prototype kino na bozalisi.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Pipeline ya boyekoli ya machine
machineLearningPipelines.description: AI ya production ebandaka na ba pipeline oyo esangisaka bansango, komeka, validation, mpe biyano.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Modele ya déploiement
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Stratégie ya déploiement eponami na kotalela bosenga ya latence, critique ya mombongo, mpe complexité ya misala.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Modèle d'exploitation ya MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Misala ya MLOps esalaka ete ba systeme ya AI ezala ya kotyelama motema, ya koyangela, mpe ya scalable ntango bato bazali kosalela yango mingi.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Kolandela mpe kotyela motema
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observabilité ekangi nzela na kati ya bizaleli ya modele mpe resultat ya misala.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data and Feature Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Kokotisa bansango na version, vérification ya qualité, mpe bandimbola ya makambo oyo ekoki kosalelama lisusu ezali moboko ya malamu mpo na formasyo ya modele.

modelDevelopment.title: Développement ya modele
modelDevelopment.description: Ba ekzame elandamaka na ba configurations oyo ekoki kobotama, ba métriques objectifs, mpe ba baselines ya bokokanisi.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Porte ya validation mpe ya sécurité
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Ba modele ya candidat elekaka performance, makasi, mpe botaleli ya politiki yambo endimama mpo na kobimisa yango.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Boucles de rétroaction opérationnelle
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Telemetrie ya nsima ya déploiement eyebisaka makambo ya priorité ya reformation, mikano ya kozongisa nsima, mpe kobongisa makambo mosusu.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Services d'inference en temps réel
realTimeInferenceServices.description: API ya latence ya moke mpo na ba applications interactives na autoscaling, caching, mpe observabilité ya niveau ya demande.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Prévisions ya batch na streaming
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Ba pipeline ya programe mpe ya makambo mpo na kozwa bilembo ya makasi na analytique mpe misala ya misala.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Déploiement ya Edge-Aware
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid cloud-edge serving patterns for environments require local inference and centralized model governance.

ciCdForModels.title: CI/CD mpo na ba modèles
ciCdForModels.description: Kotonga, komeka, mpe kobimisa misala ya automatisation ekitisaka likama ya kotinda biloko mpe ebatelaka lombango ya livraison.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Registre ya modele mpe cycle ya bomoi
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Ba artefacts ya modele oyo ezali na etando ya promotion, lineage, mpe misala ya kondima ebongisaka kolandela mpe kolandela yango.

servingInfrastructure.title: Kosalela ba infrastructures
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable serving layers with rollout strategies such as canary and shadow deployments support safe change management.

monitoringPillars.predictionQualityAndDriftDetection: Qualité ya prédiction mpe détection ya dérive
monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, débit mpe kolandela malamu talo
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Alerte ya régression ya qualité ya badonnée mpe misala ya kobongisa
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Auditabilité ya conformité mpe analyse ya incident

cta.title: Scale Applied AI with Confidence
cta.description: Soki ozali kobongisa misala ya AI oyo esengi ba resultat ya komeka mpe kobatela yango na ntango molai, Horizon ekoki kosalisa na kobongisa mpe kosalela cycle mobimba ya bomoi ya systeme.

hero.title: NLP ya minoko ebele
hero.description: Kotala makoki ya kosalela minoko naturel mpe ndenge nini yango ekomaka na bisaleli ya malamu mpe ya minoko ebele.

foundations.title: Fondations NLP
foundations.description: Traitement ya lokota naturel esangisaka bilembo ya lokota mpe boyekoli ya machine mpo na kozwa ndimbola, mokano, mpe structure ya makomi.

workbench.title: Interactive NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Salela demo mpo na komeka détection ya lokota, bilembo ya mayoki, kobimisa entité, mpe bizaleli ya kobongola na temps réel.

productionApplications.title: Ndenge Horizon esalelaka NLP na production
productionApplications.description: Makoki ya NLP esangani na misala ya kompanyi na garde-fous ya performance mpe bamétrique ya malamu ya malamu.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Mabongisi ya bosembo, mpe ya boyangeli
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: NLP ya production esengi mingi koleka qualité ya modele; Etaleli misala ya bosaleli ya malamu mpe vérification ya ntango nyonso.

foundations.intro1: Ba systeme ya NLP ya sika ya kosunga nguya ya automatisation, ntina ya boluki, kozwa boyebi, mpe boyokani ya minoko ebele. Kosalela malamu esengaka lolenge ya malamu ya modele mpe kolandela misala ya makasi.
foundations.intro2: Na Horizon, totyaka likebi na ba systeme ya NLP ya suka na suka oyo esangisi inférence ya makasi na komona, gouvernance, mpe bopusi ya production oyo ekoki komekama.

languageDetection.title: Détection ya minoko
languageDetection.description: Koyeba minɔkɔ kobanda na biteni ya makomi ya mokuse to ya molai mpo na komema bosengi na nzela ya malamu ya kosalela.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Analyse ya sentiment
sentimentAnalysis.description: Ebimisaka makanisi ya mayoki mpe polarité mpo na mayele ya bakiliya, triage ya lisalisi, mpe boucle ya feedback ya produit.

entityExtraction.title: Extraction ya entité
entityExtraction.description: Détecter ba entités structurées neti nkombo, ba kompani, bisika, mpe dates na makomi oyo ebongisami te.

translation.title: Traduction
translation.description: Esalisaka na mosala ya minoko mingi na kobongola makomi oyo euti na basaleli to na misala ntango ebombaka contexte.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Support mpe Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Classifier bosengi oyo ezali koya na lombangu, na mokano, mpe na mayoki mpo na kosala ete nzela ekende noki mpe lolenge ya koyanola.

governedContentOperations.title: Misala ya contenu etambwisami
governedContentOperations.description: Salela ba filtres ya lokota oyo eyebani na mibeko mpe ba contrôles ya moderation na bosikisiki mpe na mikano ya bokundoli.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Makanisi ya mombongo oyo esimbami na makomi
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Kosangisa mitindo ya mikanda, biyano, mpe masolo mpo na koyeba mikano mpe mikano ya misala.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Evaluation by Use Case
evaluationByUseCase.description: Ba modele etalelamaka na badataset ya domaine liboso ya kozwa bikateli ya kobimisa yango.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Bobateli ya bato na kati ya boucle
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Prévisions ya makasi ezali banzela ya bozongisi, mibeko ya komata, mpe bilembo ya confiance ya polele.

continuousMonitoring.title: Botaleli ya ntango nyonso
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, mpe kobeba ya qualité elandamaka ntango nyonso mpo ete retraining mpe rollback ezala proactive.

hero.title: Simulation ya algorithme génétique
hero.description: Tala ndenge ba calculateurs ya évolution ezali na kati ya environnement interactif mpe omona ndenge mibeko wana ebongolamaka na ba systeme ya optimisation ya production.

scientificFoundation.title: Fondation scientifique
scientificFoundation.description: Ba algorithmes génétiques ezali mayele ya optimisation ya population oyo esimbami na boponi ya naturel mpe adaptation.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Environnement interactif ya évolution
interactiveEnvironment.description: Sala simulation mpo na komona fitness ezali kokola nkola na génération mpe kotala ndenge pression ya kopona esimbaka resultat.

productionUse.title: Ndenge nini Horizon asalelaka yango na production
productionUse.description: Ba mécanique ya boluki oyo esalelamaka na demo oyo esalisaka ba pipeline ya optimisation oyo etiamaki na ba systeme opérationnels.

applicationDomains.title: Domaines ya application ya monene
applicationDomains.description: Optimisation ya évolution ezali na ntina mingi mpo na ba systeme oyo ezali na mikano ya makasi mpe ya bongolabongola.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Na esika ya koluka eyano moko na mbala moko, ba algorithmes génétiques ebongwanaka na bato ndenge na ndenge. Génération moko na moko etalelamaka na mosala ya fitness mpe ebongisamaka na nzela ya kopona, crossover, mpe mutation.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Yango esalaka ete ezala makasi mpo na mikakatano ya minene na ba contraintes non-linéaires, esika ba approches déterministes ekomaka makasi to ntalo mingi na calcul.

selection.title: Kopona
selection.description: Ba candidats ya makasi bazali na makoki mingi ya kobika mpe kozala na bopusi na nkola ya nsima.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: Bizaleli ya makasi esangisamaka mpo na kobimisa biyano ya sika ya candidat na makasi ya ndenge na ndenge.

mutation.title: Mutation
mutation.description: Randomness contrôlé introduit diversité, donc recherche ne s'arrête pas autour de l'optima locale.

convergence.title: Convergence
convergence.description: Na boumeli ya bambula mingi, bato bazalaka na mposa ya biyano ya malamu mpe ya malamu.

resourceScheduling.title: Programɛ ya ressource
resourceScheduling.description: Tosalelaka mayele ya évolution mpo na optimiser programɛ ya multicontrainte na bisika oyo boluki ya makasi ekoki kosalema te.

architectureTuning.title: Kobongisa architecture
architectureTuning.description: Ba configurations ya infrastructure ya candidat etalelamaka mbala na mbala mpo na kobongisa performance mpe kokitisa talo.

continuousOptimization.title: Optimisation ya kokoba
continuousOptimization.description: Misala ya optimisation etambolaka na ba boucles contrôlées na feedback ya télémétrie mpo ba systeme ebongwanaka ntango mposa ya bato ezali kobongwana.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Planification ya nzela mpe logistique
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Complexe ya komema mpe kotinda biloko ezwaka matomba na boluki ya évolution ntango ba contraintes ebongwani noki.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Modele na Hyperparamètre Recherche
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Boluki ya ba gènes ekoki komona lolenge ya malamu ya modele soki bisika ya objectif ezali na makelele mpe ezali linéaire te.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Mikakatano ya portefeuille mpe ya kokabola biloko
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimisation na mikano ya kowelana ekoki kotalelama lokola tradeoffs ya fitness na kati ya ba candidat oyo ezali kokola.
